title: ukgiftstoreonline Personalised Cute Christmas Keepsake Memory Box Family Baby Wood Letters, 17cm x 17cm x 8cm or 30cm x 30cm x 9cm, White (Large)
features: Customisable: This Christmas memory box allows you to personalise it with a raised, embossed-style print.
Durable Construction: Made from a luxurious 1200gsm white matt laminated rigid board, ensuring sturdiness and longevity.
Versatile Usage: Perfect for preserving cherished family memories, storing special mementos from a baby's first Christmas, or as a gift box or hamper component.
Convenient Sizes: Available in medium (17cm x 17cm x 8cm) and large (30cm x 30cm x 9cm) dimensions.
Elegant Design: The box's luxurious and stylish appearance makes it a beautiful addition to any home decor.
description: Preserve cherished memories and special mementos in this customisable Christmas memory box. The personalised print creates a stunning embossed-style feature on the sturdy, durable box made from luxurious 1200gsm white matt laminated rigid board. Available in medium (17cm x 17cm x 8cm) and large (30cm x 30cm x 9cm) sizes, it's perfect for gifting, storing keepsakes from a baby's first Christmas, or creating a festive hamper. Elegantly designed and built to last, this memory box offers a stylish way to treasure your most precious holiday moments.
